endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkWatchers/{networkWatcherName}/connectionMonitors
endpoints.description: Lists all connection monitors for the specified Network Watcher.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NETWORKWATCHERNAME}} with a real networkwatchername. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/networkWatchers/{networkWatcherName}/connectionMonitors/{connectionMonitorName}
endpoints.description: Gets a connection monitor by name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NETWORKWATCHERNAME}} with a real networkwatchername. Replace {{CONNECTIONMONITORNAME}} with a real connectionmonitorname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
